name: Thanksgiving Gravy-v
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Poultry seasoning or other mixed herbs (1/8 tsp Dried sage, 1/3 tsp Dried thyme, 1/8 tsp Dried rosemary, 1/8 tsp Black or white pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except cornstarch or arrowroot in a 4-quart pot.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat, then lower the heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. At serving time, dissolve thickener in 1/2 cup cold water.
4. Bring the gravy to a low boil.
5. Slowly pour in the thickener while stirring until the gravy turns from milky to smooth and thick.
6. Add enough thickener to reach the desired consistency.
7. Makes 8 cups.
Note: Poultry seasoning does not contain animal products. If you don't have poultry seasoning, use 2 to 3 teaspoons of a mixture of rosemary, sage, thyme, marjoram, and basil.
Per 1/2 serving:
34 calories; 1 gram protein; 0.1 gram fat; 5 grams carbohydrates; 0 cholesterol; 618 milligrams sodium; 4 grams fiber.
